title: Tesla's TERAFAB: The $25 Billion Bet on Orbital AI
author: Howard
excerpt: Tesla, SpaceX, and xAI unveil TERAFAB—a $25 billion chip factory joint venture producing 1 terawatt of AI compute annually. 80% destined for space-based orbital AI satellites. The AI5 chip is already in production.

image_prompts.hero: Futuristic semiconductor megafactory TERAFAB at dusk, massive advanced manufacturing facility with glowing clean rooms and robotic assembly lines visible through transparent walls, rocket launch pads visible in background, Texas landscape, cinematic lighting, sci-fi industrial aesthetic, hyper-detailed, 8k, dramatic atmospheric perspective
